name: Frich
location: Frich makes financial literacy social. We help GenZ achieve their financial goals by giving them access to their peers financial habits and allowing them to build better financial literacy as a community.

name: Vero Technologies
location: By using alternative data, Vero has developed a unique approach that makes it more efficient to profile auto dealers, underwrite credit facilities and most importantly, monitor dealership risk in real-time through the life of the commercial loan. They are launching a floorplan lending platform focused on independent used car dealerships. The platform will deploy tools to digitize the risk management and credit administration functions.
